clusters.justification: This domain represents the generalized processing of emotional valence, arousal, and mood states typically mediated by co-activation within the salience and broader limbic networks.
This domain encompasses the computation of expected utility, incentive salience, and reinforcement-guided action selection driven by frontostriatal reward circuitry.
This domain captures internally directed representations of the self and others, relying on the default mode network to support complex interpersonal, autobiographical, and conceptual models.
